text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Only a few days remain until tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Th-th-th-this is a disaster! I'm ruined!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Classes are done for the day. A flustered Matikanefukukitaru bursts
into the trainers' room.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Waaah! What do I dooooo?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Sniff... So I was doing a divination earlier to see how tryouts would turn out...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: And it said that I would experience a great misfortune!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: The harbinger of death is upon me! I must rid myself of this evil!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Extra! Extra! Breaking news—hot off the press!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what are you talking about, Taiki? I've got a bad feeling about
this...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: They announced the groups for the tryouts! Fukukitaru, you won't believe who you're going against! It's gonna blow your mind!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle begins to recite the list of runners, and
Matikanefukukitaru's face grows more pale with every additional
name.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the runners in her group are extremely skilled—certainly good
enough to make their debuts.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Arghhh! I'm done for! The race hasn't even begun, and it's already
over!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This is what the divination meant by misfortune—I'm sure of it! Why
did I even bother?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a look of defeat, Matikanefukukitaru's shoulders slump, and she
very gloomily goes about her training.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Nnnnrgh! Fiiinally done!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... You don't need to tell me my time. I already know I didn't do well today.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Yeah, sounds good to me.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Sigh... It's impossible to break free from the shackles of destiny, huh?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But I already knew that. I just didn't want to accept it—that I'm not
good enough to run in the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I actually have an older sister. She's good at everything—the perfect
model child. So people would often compare the two of us.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Don't get me wrong, it's not like I hate my sister! If anything, I really
respect her!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: It's just really hard not to compare myself with her at times...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I mean, I wasn't even sure of whether or not I should—or well, could—attend Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But in the midst of my angst, the great Shiraoki appeared by my side
and told me...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: "Run! Run, and the path before you shall open!"

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I took her words to heart and ran as fast and as hard as I could. Her
guidance is why I'm even here at all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Listening to Matikanefukukitaru pour her heart out, I'm reminded of
our conversation the other day.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If I'm ever feeling lost, down, or anxious, she cheers me up—makes
me feel better! She even helped me during my scrimmage with Taiki!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The reason why I'm even here right now is all thanks to the great
Shiraoki! I chose to believe in her, and that brought me to where I am
today...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm unsure what Matikanefukukitaru means when she talks about this
Shiraoki being, but whatever her reasons, the divinations seem to be
motivating her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The divinations and fortune-telling are dear to her, and they have
indeed helped her get this far. That much I can tell. Perhaps I can put
this information to use...
choice_data_list: Actually, why don't we keep training?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Huh? But my luck has already hit rock bottom! You wouldn't find a gal
as jinxed as me even if you tried! Running in this state would be
completely pointless!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru is reluctant to resume her training, but I
eventually sway her, and we commence round two of our training.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... I can't do this... anymore... My body... won't move...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The divination was right... Today's training is nothing but misfortune
after misfortune...
choice_data_list:
Just how much do you believe in these
divinations of yours?

Just how much do you believe in these
divinations of yours?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Huh? What are you talking about? I completely and utterly believe in
them, of course!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All the fortune-telling I've ever done has led me to where I am today!
It's basically my entire life!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So it's not a question of whether or not I believe in them. They're
true—they have to be.
choice_data_list:
If that's the case, then you and I were also
destined to meet, right?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Of course! You're the trainer who will change my fate!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's why I need to prove myself at the next tryouts—to show you
the results of all my hard training!
choice_data_list: Enough about the results, then! Just run!
Enough about the results, then! Just run!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Just... run?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, I think I get it! You're right! I was being such a fool!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I have to quit dwelling on the outcomes and focus on running! Fortune
or misfortune, I need to run my best during tryouts!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I'll do whatever it takes to get scouted by you! That's my goal!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Screw you, misfortune! I'm going to charge ahead and show you what I'm really capable of!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All right, I think I'm ready for another round of running! Come at me,
world! I'll rise to whatever challenge you have in store with everything
I've got!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a renewed look of pure resolve, the now energized
Matikanefukukitaru once again dashes off into the distance.
